description: Places a text label (rendered via MathText/LaTeX) spanning a range on the number line. Useful for annotating intervals, segments, or regions with custom text.
utility: Label a range on a number line with text

arguments.name: range
arguments.description: Span on the number line to label

arguments.name: text
arguments.description: Label text (supports LaTeX via text processing)

examples.expression:
N = nl(at(5, 2), range(0, 5))
nllabel(N, range(0, 1), "1 unit")
